LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SAXON MORTGAGE, INC, DEUTSCH BANK NATIONAL TRUST, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST AS TRUSTEE FOR THE SAXON ASSET SECTUR TR 2007-4'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER TO THE 2ND THROUGH 9TH, 11TH THROUGH 14TH AND 16TH AND 17TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT THESE CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S CURRENT PLEADING IS CONCLUSORY AND NOT FACT SPECIFIC. DEMURRER TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF THE ROSENTHAL ACT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT IS NOT A DEBT COLLECTOR AND FORECLOSURE IS NOT CONSIDERED A COLLECTION PROCEDURE UNDER CALIFORNIA CASE LAW. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 15TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CCP 2934(D) AND (E) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT IS CORRECT THAT DEFENDANT DOES NOT LACK STANDING TO BRING A NONJUDICIAL FORECLOSURE. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 16TH AND 17TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RESCISSION AND DECLARATORY RELIEF BECAUSE THEY CAN BE BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM OF A VIOLATION OF CC1632. CLERK LEFT MESSAGES FOR COUNSEL OF RECORD TO ADVISE THEM OF THE COURT'S MODIFICATION TO THE RULING. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SAXON MORTGAGE, INC., AND MORGAN STANLEY CAPITAL SERVICES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS FOLLOWS: SECOND (2ND) CAUSE OF ACTION - TO ALLEGE BREACH AFTER OF CONTRACT EXECUTION AND FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; 3RD, 6TH & 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION - TO ALLEGE FRAUD WITH REQUISITE PARTICULARITY AND FACTS SUPPORTING COMMON ENTERPRISE ALLEGATION; 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION - ONLY SURVIVES IF OTHERS SURVIVE. PAGES 16-22 OF OPPOSITION ARE STRICKEN EXCEEDS PAGE LIMIT PER CRC 3.1113(D), THEREFORE NO OPPOSITION TO 5, 8-13, AND 16-18 CAUSES OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS SAXON MORTGAGE, INC, DEUTSCH BANK NATIONAL TRUST, DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST AS TRUSTEE FOR THE SAXON ASSET SECTUR TR 2007-4'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court modified its ruling as follows: demurrer to the 2nd through 9th, 11th through 14th and 16th and 17th causes of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts sufficient to support these causes of action. Plaintiff's current pleading is conclusory and not fact specific.
Demurrer to the 10th cause of action for Violation of the Rosenthal Act is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant is not a debt collector and foreclosure is not considered a collection procedure under California case law.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 15th cause of action for Violation of CCP 2934(d) and (e) is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant is correct that Defendant does not lack standing to bring a nonjudicial foreclosure.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 16th and 17th causes of action is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff is entitled to rescission and declaratory relief because they can be based on Plaintiff's claim of a violation of CC1632.
Clerk left messages for counsel of record to advise them of the court's modification to the ruling. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
